---
title: "week12"
author: "Patrick McGonagle"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: html_document
---

# Libraries 

```{r message = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(tm)
library(jsonlite)
library(stm)
library(caret)
library(textclean)
library(textstem)
library(httr)
library(wordcloud)
# Didn't use qdap due to insane java troubleshooting, tried to accomplish the same without 
```

# Data Import and Cleaning 

```{r}
# USED AI - RedditExtractoR didn't allow me to pull the entire last year, ran into misc errors 

# all_posts <- list()
# next_page <- ""
# for (i in 1:10) { # Loop 
#   request <- GET(
#     url = "https://www.reddit.com/r/IOPsychology/new.json",
#     query = list(limit = 100, after = next_page),
#     add_headers(`User-agent` = "psy8712_task")
#   ) # Requests from URL 
#   content <- fromJSON(content(request, as = "text")) # Pulls the JSON from API
#   all_posts[[i]] <- content$data$children$data # getting content for for loop 
#   next_page <- content$data$after # Saying "go to next page"
#   if (is.null(next_page)) break #Break so it doens't run ad infintum 
# }
# week12_raw_tbl <- bind_rows(all_posts) |>
#   select(upvotes = ups, title) 
# saveRDS(week12_raw_tbl, "week12_tbl.rds") # Final data import 

# Commented out for loop after first run

# Tibble creation 
week12_tbl <- readRDS("week12_tbl.rds") |>
  as_tibble()

# Original corpus 
io_corpus_original <- VCorpus(VectorSource(week12_tbl$title))

# Remove IO terms using function (used AI regex)
remove_io_terms <- function(x) {
  gsub("i[\\/-]?o|industrial[\\s-]?organizational|psychology|psych", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
}

# Pre-processing 
io_corpus <- io_corpus_original |>
  tm_map(content_transformer(tolower)) |> # Everything lowercase 
  tm_map(content_transformer(remove_io_terms)) |> # Removing "IO" terms 
  tm_map(content_transformer(replace_contraction)) |> # getting rid of contradictions (i.e., "dont")
  tm_map(content_transformer(replace_symbol)) |> # Removing symbols like & and @
  tm_map(removePunctuation) |> # Getting rid of punctuation
  tm_map(removeNumbers) |> # Getting rid of numbers 
  tm_map(removeWords, stopwords("en")) |> # Removing stop words 
  tm_map(content_transformer(lemmatize_strings)) # lemmetizing 

# Spot checking shows steps were effective 

# Random row check function 
compare_them <- function(corp1, corp2) {
  idx <- 1:length(corp2) |> 
    sample(1) # Generate a random index 
  cat("Original Title:", corp1[[idx]]$content, "\n") # Print original 
  cat("Cleaned Title:", corp2[[idx]]$content, "\n") # print cleaned 
}

# Test
compare_them(io_corpus_original, io_corpus)

# Multiple checks show that this works
```
